name: AI RMF 1.0 ↔ ISO/IEC 23894 Crosswalk
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST-published crosswalk mapping AI RMF 1.0 elements to ISO/IEC 23894 (AI risk management guidance). Enables organizations using either framework to identify equivalent practices in the other.
relationToCloudSecurity: Useful for cloud-AI implementers needing to satisfy ISO requirements while operating under AI RMF or vice versa.
relationToAISecurity: Direct mapping between two major AI risk management frameworks.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

current_extraction.notes: Extracted from source PDF via the marker pipeline.

notes: Bidirectional crosswalk between AI RMF and ISO/IEC 23894.
